tests.name: release_workflow_created
tests.details: .github/workflows/release.yml MISSING. Init.sh's get_release_template looks up templates/pipelines/release/github/${PLATFORM}.yml — but PLATFORM='mcp_server' (underscore) while the shipped template is named mcp-server.yml (hyphen). init.sh silently print_info skips the release pipeline. See framework_bugs[0].

tests.details: .claude/framework/ directory present.

tests.name: context7_detection

tests.name: platform_module_present
tests.details: docs/platform-modules/ is empty. No mcp_server.md (underscore) or mcp-server.md (hyphen) was copied. verify-install reported the missing module as a manual action. See framework_bugs[1].

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: From $FRAMEWORK, init.sh exits 1 with [FAIL] 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo.' (PR #18 holds).

framework_bugs.summary: init.sh skips release pipeline for mcp_server (underscore vs hyphen template name)
framework_bugs.actual: init.sh logs '[INFO] No release pipeline template for platform mcp_server on host github. Skipping release pipeline.' because it looks up '.../mcp_server.yml' (underscore) but the shipped template is 'mcp-server.yml' (hyphen). No release.yml is created. Init.sh exits 0 so the failure is silent. Init.sh accepts --platform mcp_server explicitly (init.sh:2605 help, validation 2772-2776) so the canonical platform key is mcp_server.

framework_bugs.summary: Platform module mcp_server.md missing — naming mismatch with shipped mcp-server.md
framework_bugs.expected: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md (or mcp-server.md) copied into project from $FRAMEWORK/docs/platform-modules/.
framework_bugs.actual: Empty docs/platform-modules/. Framework ships docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md (hyphen) but verify-install.sh:174-179 looks up '${PLATFORM}.md' where PLATFORM=mcp_server (underscore). The auto-fix at verify-install.sh:605-608 also fails because it concatenates the same underscore name. Same root cause as bug 1: PLATFORM key is normalized to underscore for runtime, but file names on disk use hyphen.

tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh prints 'Phase gates consistent.' RC=0 after all phase 1 steps.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: After gate passes and steps complete, .current_phase remains 0. No script auto-advances current_phase. This is U-D from the prior sweep (still open per runbook). See framework_bugs[0].

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after phase 1 gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: complete all phase1_architecture steps, run bash scripts/check-phase-gate.sh → output: 'Current phase: 0 / Phase gates consistent.' even though phase 1 completed
framework_bugs.expected: After successful gate, .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase should advance to 1 (or a documented script does this).
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stays at 0; check-phase-gate.sh is read-only and process-checklist.sh has no --advance-phase command. Re-confirms U-D from 2026-04-25 sweep.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' succeeded RC=0 without an active build_loop. Confirms U-C: PreToolUse hooks don't fire for shell-direct git invocations. See framework_bugs[0].

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After test-gate.sh --record-feature uat-feat-1 and starting uat-feat-2, the pre-commit-gate.sh (invoked via simulated PreToolUse JSON payload) returned empty stdout RC=0 (allow) for a feat: commit. PR #17 grace-window reset works.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema. Direct git commit succeeded (U-C path), but pre-commit-gate.sh invoked through simulated PreToolUse correctly returned permissionDecision='deny' with the pending question. PR #17 BL-015 sentinel is wired.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed the sentinel; subsequent gate invocation returned empty stdout (allow). RC=0.

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .claude/build-progress.json .features_completed == ['uat-feat-1'].

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: shell-direct git commit bypasses BL-006 PreToolUse gate
framework_bugs.expected: Commit blocked by BL-006 gate (or by a git commit-msg hook that runs even outside Claude Code).
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds. PreToolUse hooks only fire under Claude Code. Re-confirms U-C from prior sweep.

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: After populating __SCENARIOS_JSON__/__FEATURE_OPTIONS__/__SESSION_DATE__/__SESSION_FEATURES__/__SESSION_TITLE__/__TESTER_PRE_FLIGHT__/__FEATURE_SECTIONS__ the linter returned RC=0 with one residual reference to '__PLACEHOLDER__' on line 142 of the template's own comment ('Do not modify any code outside the __PLACEHOLDER__ tokens'). The literal '__PLACEHOLDER__' text inside that comment is a template self-reference, not a real placeholder; tracked as documentation gap.

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS completed with stub artifacts.

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: All 9 phase3_validation steps completed with stubbed artifacts (test-results files, security-audits/uat-feat-1). check-phase-gate.sh RC=0 'Phase gates consistent.'

documentation_gaps.gap: lint-uat-scenarios.sh flags the literal token '__PLACEHOLDER__' in line 142 of the template comment ('Do not modify any code outside the __PLACEHOLDER__ tokens') as an unreplaced placeholder. The comment is meant to describe the placeholder pattern itself; consider rewording the comment to use back-quotes or splitting the token so the linter doesn't false-positive on it.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only pre-existing .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ untracked. git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD == d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (matches setup capture).

summary: Two High-severity bugs found: (1) init.sh silently skips creating .github/workflows/release.yml for --platform mcp_server because templates are named mcp-server.yml (hyphen) but PLATFORM key uses underscore; (2) docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md is never installed for the same hyphen-vs-underscore mismatch. U-C and U-D from prior sweep re-confirmed (Medium). All BL-015, BL-006 grace, framework-self-guard, and PR #18/19 fixes hold. Phase 4 correctly blocked for sponsored_poc.
